title: 2017 stand-alone dental plan (SADP) data
meta-description: Dental coverage is offered as part of some health plans, but not all of them. The data below includes 2017 stand-alone dental plans available in a given area.
excerpt: Dental coverage is offered as part of some health plans, but not all of them. The data below includes 2017 stand-alone dental plans available in a given area.
content:
Dental coverage is offered as part of some health plans, but not all of them. The data below includes 2017 stand-alone dental plans available in a given area.

For 2016 dental plan data, visit this page.

Note: The data below will be most useful to developers, professionals, researchers, and others who want to study, analyze, and download the complete dataset of 2017 plan and price information. All others should use our user-friendly tool for previewing 2017 plans and prices.

See all available 2017 health plans.

View instructions or download (ZIP file).
